title: Apply for a cannabis licence from the CRA - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for a cannabis licence from the CRA
The information described on this webpage is based on the Excise Act, 2001 and its regulations .
Determine if you need to apply for a cannabis licence, eligibility conditions, how to apply for the licence, and what to expect after you apply.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
